General.Name: Carpenter Tan Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Carpenter Tan Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, designs, manufactures, and distributes wooden handicrafts and accessories under the Carpenter Tan brand. The company offers wooden or horn combs, such as colored drawing combs, grass-and-tree dyed wooden combs, and carved combs; pocket-size wooden mirrors that includes colored drawing mirrors and carved mirrors; other wooden accessories and adornments comprising bead bracelets, pendants, barrettes, hair bobs, and massage tools; and box sets that combine its products in themes for gift purpose. It is also involved in the operation of retail shops in Hong Kong and the People's Republic of China, as well as franchise and distribution network primarily in the People's Republic of China; distribution of wooden handicrafts and accessories through internet; and property investment activities. Carpenter Tan Holdings Limited was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Kowloon, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Witty Commercial Building, Kowloon, Hong Kong
